name: Iyatọ SALT (Iwọn, Ayẹwo, Awọn Itumọ Igbalaaye, Itọju/ Irinna)
description: Ilana iyasọ olupaniyan pupọ. Iwọnwọn fun awọn iṣẹlẹ ipaniyan pupọ ni ologun ati awọn eto ara ilu.
instructions: Igbesẹ 1: too agbaye (nrin, fifẹ, ṣi). Igbesẹ 2: Ṣe ayẹwo ni aṣẹ pataki. Igbesẹ 3: Ṣe awọn ilowosi igbala (ṣakoso iṣakoso ẹjẹ nla, ọna atẹgun ṣiṣi, idinku abẹrẹ, awọn abẹrẹ adaṣe). Igbesẹ 4: Fi ẹka sọtọ.

categories.label: Oreti/Oku
categories.description: Ko ṣee ṣe lati yege awọn orisun ti o wa, tabi ti o ti jẹrisi oku

categories.label: Lẹsẹkẹsẹ (T1)
categories.description: Awọn ipalara ti o lewu igbesi aye, yoo ye pẹlu ilowosi lẹsẹkẹsẹ

categories.label: Idaduro (T2)
categories.description: Awọn ipalara to ṣe pataki ṣugbọn iduroṣinṣin, le duro fun itọju

categories.label: Pọọku (T3)
categories.description: Awọn ipalara kekere -- nrin ti o gbọgbẹ

categories.label: Ireti
categories.description: Ipalara ti ko le yege fun awọn orisun lọwọlọwọ - itọju itunu nikan

pediatric.note: JumpSTART triage algorithm ṣe atunṣe SALT fun awọn alaisan ọmọde. Awọn iloro oṣuwọn atẹgun ati awọn igbesẹ igbelewọn yatọ fun awọn ọmọde labẹ ọdun 8.

source: SALT Mass Casualty Triage (CDC/CHEMPACK), JTS CPG
